description: Baseline from a successful Sunbeam CI run. Patterns listed here fire during NORMAL healthy deployments and should be treated as bootstrap noise when analyzing failed runs.

CILIUM_CNI_MISSING.note: Machines always missing cilium_host interface during bootstrap — resolves after CNI init

SUNBEAM_CLUSTERD_UNAVAILABLE.note: Clusterd service not initialized during early bootstrap phase

K8S_DNS_RESOLUTION_FAIL.note: DNS resolution fails transiently while CoreDNS is starting

JUJU_WORKER_UNEXPECTED_ERROR.note: Transient manifold worker errors during model setup — self-recovers

MYSQL_CONNECTION_REFUSED.note: MySQL not ready during initial charm install — retried successfully

RABBITMQ_CONNECTION_LOST.note: RabbitMQ AMQP connections reset during initial charm install

PIPELINE_COMMAND_FAILED.note: Commands fail and are retried during setup phases

SNAP_SERVICE_CRASH_LOOP.note: Snap services restart during initial install before config is applied

OPENSTACK_HYPERVISOR_ERROR.note: Hypervisor errors during early deployment before all services are up

SUNBEAM_JUJU_ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND.note: Juju user account not yet created during early bootstrap

OVN_CONNECTION_RESET.note: OVN/OVS SSL connections reset during network setup — normal reconnect behavior

SNAP_INSTALL_FAILED.note: Transient snap install failures that are retried successfully

NETWORK_TIMEOUT.note: Network timeouts during bootstrap while services are starting

APPARMOR_DENIED.note: AppArmor denials during snap confinement setup — expected

CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT.note: Curl connection timeouts during cloud-init provisioning

SYSTEMD_NETWORKD_WAIT_TIMEOUT.note: systemd-networkd-wait-online timeout during k8s bootstrap — transient

NETWORK_CONNECTION_REFUSED.note: Connection refused during service startup before ports are bound

VALIDATION_SMOKE_FAILURE.note: Transient smoke test failures that pass on retry
